summary.title: AEP Action Plane Metrics Hardening
summary.description: Validation of Action Plane metrics implementation in GatewayMetrics. Ensures that pattern matches, agent executions, evidence writes, policy evaluations, and commit SHA validations are properly tracked and exposed for observability.

actionPlaneMetrics.purpose: Gateway metrics with Action Plane-specific counters for observability

hardeningFeatures.description: Tracks pattern matches by type for observability.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: recordPatternMatch() increments counter for pattern type. Exposed in snapshot as patternMatchesByType.
validationRules: Pattern matches are recorded by type
Counters increment for same pattern type
Metrics are reset on reset() call
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Pattern Match Metrics test suite with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Tracks agent executions by status for observability.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: recordAgentExecution() increments counter for execution status. Exposed in snapshot as agentExecutionsByStatus.
validationRules: Agent executions are recorded by status
Metrics are reset on reset() call
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Agent Execution Metrics test suite with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Tracks evidence writes by status for observability.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: recordEvidenceWrite() increments counter for write status. Exposed in snapshot as evidenceWritesByStatus.
validationRules: Evidence writes are recorded by status
Metrics are reset on reset() call
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Evidence Write Metrics test suite with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Tracks policy evaluations by decision for observability.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: recordPolicyEvaluation() increments counter for evaluation decision. Exposed in snapshot as policyEvaluationsByDecision.
validationRules: Policy evaluations are recorded by decision
Metrics are reset on reset() call
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Policy Evaluation Metrics test suite with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Tracks commit SHA validations by result for observability.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: recordCommitShaValidation() increments counter for validation result. Exposed in snapshot as commitShaValidationsByResult.
validationRules: Commit SHA validations are recorded by result
Metrics are reset on reset() call
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Commit SHA Validation Metrics test suite with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Action Plane metrics integrate with existing gateway metrics.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: Action Plane metrics are stored in separate Maps and included in snapshot alongside existing gateway metrics.
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Action Plane Metrics Integration test suite with 3 tests

testCategories.name: Pattern Match Metrics
testCategories.coverage: Records pattern match by type, increments count for same type, resets on reset

testCategories.name: Agent Execution Metrics
testCategories.coverage: Records agent execution by status, increments count for same status, resets on reset

testCategories.name: Evidence Write Metrics
testCategories.coverage: Records evidence write by status, increments count for same status, resets on reset

testCategories.name: Policy Evaluation Metrics
testCategories.coverage: Records policy evaluation by decision, increments count for same decision, resets on reset

testCategories.name: Commit SHA Validation Metrics
testCategories.coverage: Records commit SHA validation by result, increments count for same result, resets on reset

testCategories.name: Action Plane Metrics Integration
testCategories.coverage: Records all Action Plane metrics independently, preserves existing gateway metrics, resets all metrics

aepObservability.purpose: AEP observability specification with required metrics

gatewayMetrics.purpose: Gateway metrics implementation with Action Plane metrics

productionTruthGuarantees: Pattern matches are tracked by type for observability
Agent executions are tracked by status for monitoring
Evidence writes are tracked by status for audit trail
Policy evaluations are tracked by decision for governance
Commit SHA validations are tracked by result for production truth
All metrics are exposed in snapshot for monitoring
securityConsiderations: Metrics provide visibility into Action Plane operations
Commit SHA validation metrics track production truth enforcement
Policy evaluation metrics track governance decisions
Evidence write metrics track audit trail persistence
Agent execution metrics track agent behavior
notes: Action Plane metrics are implemented in GatewayMetrics class
Metrics are tracked using Map-based counters
All Action Plane metrics are exposed in snapshot
Metrics integrate with existing gateway metrics
Test coverage includes all Action Plane metric types
Metrics are resettable for testing purposes
Observability is maintained through comprehensive metric tracking
